task_completion.description: The agent opened the source CSV file in a spreadsheet application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) is open, displaying the ED visit logs data.

task_completion.description: The agent calculated 'Door-to-Doctor Time' and 'Total LOS' in minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: New columns for 'Door-to-Doctor Time' and 'Total LOS' are visible in the spreadsheet, populated with numerical values representing minutes.

task_completion.description: The agent created a status column flagging visits as 'Breach' or 'Compliant'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column is visible containing text values like 'Breach' or 'Compliant' based on the Total LOS exceeding 240 minutes.

task_completion.description: The agent created a summary sheet with overall average Door-to-Doctor time and LWBS rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate sheet (e.g., 'Summary' tab) is visible, displaying the calculated average Door-to-Doctor time (approx 58.5) and an LWBS rate (approx 4.1%).

task_completion.description: The agent created a summary table grouping Total LOS by Acuity_ESI level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the summary sheet, a table is visible listing ESI levels (1 to 5) alongside their corresponding average or median Total LOS values.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the final dashboard as an Excel file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet application's title bar or a save dialog shows the file name as 'ed_operations_dashboard.xlsx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a spreadsheet GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a spreadsheet application like LibreOffice Calc, not just terminal commands or Python scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet features/formulas rather than hardcoding answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in the spreadsheet application shows actual formulas (e.g., subtraction for times, IF statements for Breach/Compliant) rather than typed-in static values.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file in a genuine Excel format, not just renaming a CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog or application title indicates the file type is explicitly set to Microsoft Excel (.xlsx), not Text CSV (.csv).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 1500 records. The target LOS for the breach flag is 240 minutes. Valid flag keywords are 'Breach' and 'Compliant'. The LWBS rate should be approximately 4.1% (or 0.041). The actual average Door-to-Doctor time is approximately 58.5 minutes. ESI levels range from 1 to 5.
